MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF OMAR ROSALES' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Moving and opposing parties failed to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Hearing re:PLAINTIFF OMAR ROSALES's MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.

No appearances made. The court adopts the tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for both sides' noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Upon compliance, motion may be re-set for any court day after January 2. Papers shall bear new hearing date.
